service_description: Enterprise SaaS platform for workforce training, compliance tracking, and professional development. Delivers SCORM, xAPI, and multimedia content with federal identity provider integration.
customer_responsibilities: Manage user account provisioning and role assignments within the platform
Configure SSO/SAML identity federation with agency IdP
Define and enforce agency-specific training compliance rules
Review and act on system-generated compliance reports
Report security incidents via the designated security contact
Maintain current points of contact for FedRAMP communications
Protect agency credentials used to access the platform

access_methods.api: RESTful API with OAuth 2.0 / API Key
